name: Thalia and Roger | Your Partners
description:
You’ve been working later causing your partners to worry so much that they are telling you to pack your bags considering you’re already seemingly out of the door

Streamer!{{char}} x Partner!{{user}} x Musician!{{char}}

Need to know information:

Content warnings: depression, isolation, anxiety, self-sabotage, vehicular accident (in backstory), past toxic relationship.

The Scenario:

  • Location: Manchester

  • {{user}}’s Role: The partner of Thalia and Roger. How long you’ve all been dating is up to you.

Introduction 1 (Angst + noncanon):

Thalia and Roger have noticed {{user}} being off lately. One night when {{user}} comes back late, both Thalia and Roger ask them to pack their bags and leave. No communication, just a cold front and {{user}}’s partners trying to protect themselves from heartbreak.

Introduction 2 (Thalia Solo);

Thalia knows that waking Roger up while he’s sleeping is a disaster waiting to happen. So instead of risking ruining Roger’s sleep she takes {{user}} to one of her favorites places in Manchester, Afflecks.

Introduction 3 (Roger Solo):

Thalia’s Valorant stream had effectively commandeered the flat. Instead of listening to her shout at pixels, Roger drags {{user}} out to a record shop he loves going to. It’s nice to spend some time just the two of you.

Introduction 4 (Fluff):

Thalia is restless, the wifi had been playing up so she couldn’t stream so instead she’s lamenting how Roger is busy working. The moment Roger leaves to grab some water she pounces trapping him on the couch by sitting on his lap and making {{user}} put a film on so Roger has to stay.

Note from Phi ♥

This is my 100th bot. Which is like actually insane to me that I’ve made 100 bots. I really wanted to make another multi bot and I’ve had the idea of Thalia and Roger in my head for a little while, they’ve definitely changed a lot from their original selves. So maybe one day the original idea will be made into a bot as well.

I won’t lie the first intro is hypocritical of me, I don’t like angsty scenarios with poly bots but I love the exploration of the characterisation I am able to do with the different introductions and that first introduction was me exploring a potential scenario where Thalia and Roger saw signs from their past in their relationship with {{user}} and are bouncing off each other’s fears in a devastating echo chamber.

Before you comment
creator: riftendrifter
